pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on JDK 21; keeping 1.8 would result in incompatible bytecode or compilation errors if source code uses Java 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version from 2.0.8.RELEASE to 3.3.13 to support Jakarta EE namespace and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Jakarta EE (javax.* -> jakarta.*) and has dropped support for Java 21; without this, the application fails to start or compile due to missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may fail to compile Java 21 source code or generate incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 and JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to execute tests on Java 21 or lack support for JUnit 5 Jupiter engine.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-war-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 and modern Maven.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older WAR plugin versions may have compatibility issues with Java 21 module system or newer Maven versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo plugin to a version that supports Java 21 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: JaCoCo 0.8.2 does not support Java 21 bytecode, causing instrumentation failures during test coverage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove Springfox dependencies which are incompatible with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox relies on javax.servlet and older Spring APIs; it fails to compile or run on Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JUnit Jupiter dependency to enable JUnit 5 testing framework.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires JUnit 5; without this dependency, JUnit 5 tests will fail to compile or run.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta classifier to Ehcache dependency to use the Jakarta EE namespace version.
pom.xml.why_exists: The default Ehcache artifact uses javax.*; Spring Boot 3 requires jakarta.*. Without the classifier, classpath conflicts or missing classes occur.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Mail API dependency to replace javax.mail for email functionality.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.mail is removed in Jakarta EE; code using mail APIs will fail to compile without jakarta.mail-api.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use the release flag matching the Java version property.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures bytecode compatibility with the target JDK; without it, the compiler might not enforce Java 21 language features or compatibility.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/Jojoaddison.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/Jojoaddison.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 environments; using it causes a compile error (cannot find symbol).

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/aop/logging.general_idea: Update Environment.acceptsProfiles call to use the new Profiles.of() factory method required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/aop/logging.why_exists: The method Environment.acceptsProfiles(String...) was removed in Spring Framework 6.x (used by Spring Boot 3.x); calling it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/aop/logging.general_idea: Add import for the new Profiles class used in the updated acceptsProfiles call.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/aop/logging.why_exists: The Profiles class is not imported by default; without this import, the code fails to compile due to an unresolved symbol.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Clou.general_idea: Replace deprecated MongoDbFactory with MongoDatabaseFactory to align with Spring Data MongoDB API changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Clou.why_exists: Compile error: class 'org.springframework.data.mongodb.MongoDbFactory' does not exist in Spring Data MongoDB 4.x (used by Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Clou.general_idea: Update bean return type from MongoDbFactory to MongoDatabaseFactory.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Clou.why_exists: Compile error: incompatible types; MongoDbFactory is no longer available.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Clou.general_idea: Update Mongobee bean parameter type from MongoDbFactory to MongoDatabaseFactory.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Clou.why_exists: Compile error: incompatible types; MongoDbFactory is no longer available.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Clou.before: public Mongobee mongobee(MongoDbFactory mongoDbFactory, MongoTemplate mongoTemplate, Cloud cloud) {
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Clou.after: public Mongobee mongobee(MongoDatabaseFactory mongoDbFactory, MongoTemplate mongoTemplate, Cloud cloud) {

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Clou.general_idea: Update cloud service lookup to use MongoDatabaseFactory class instead of MongoDbFactory.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Clou.why_exists: Compile error: class 'org.springframework.data.mongodb.MongoDbFactory' does not exist.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.general_idea: Replace deprecated javax.annotation import with jakarta.annotation for Jakarta EE 9+ compatibility.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Java 9+ and Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+ (jakarta.* namespace); using javax causes compile errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.general_idea: Replace deprecated EnableGlobalMethodSecurity annotation with EnableMethodSecurity for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.why_exists: EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compile errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in WebSecurity configuration for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compile errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.general_idea: Refactor HttpSecurity configuration from legacy fluent API to lambda-based DSL for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.why_exists: Legacy methods like .csrf().disable() and .authorizeRequests().antMatchers() are removed in Spring Security 6; using them causes compile errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in HttpSecurity configuration for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compile errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.general_idea: Update securityConfigurerAdapter application to use lambda-based DSL withDefaults for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Secu.why_exists: Legacy .apply() method is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes compile errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+/Spring Boot 3, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.general_idea: Update Environment.acceptsProfiles to use the new Profiles.of() API introduced in Spring Framework 6.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.why_exists: The varargs acceptsProfiles(String...) method is deprecated/removed in favor of acceptsProfiles(Profiles) in Spring Boot 3, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Auth.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Auth.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Cont.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Cont.why_exists: javax.validation package is no longer available on the classpath in Spring Boot 3, causing a compile error (cannot find symbol) for imports and annotations.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Pers.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Pers.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Slid.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Slid.why_exists: Compilation failure: The serialVersionUID field in a Serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+ (enforced by default in Java 17+ with --enable-preview or specific compiler flags, and strictly required for clean compilation in modern strict environments).

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Slid.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/Slid.why_exists: Compilation failure: Cannot resolve symbol 'Serial' without the import.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/User.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/User.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/User.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/User.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/domain/User.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.why_exists: Compilation failure: classes in the javax.servlet package are no longer available on the classpath in Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE environments; the code must reference jakarta.servlet instead.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Spring Boot 3 namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.annotation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments used by Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/service/Mai.general_idea: Migrate JavaMail API imports from javax.mail to jakarta.mail to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/service/Mai.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.mail does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; classes are now under jakarta.mail.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/service/Mai.general_idea: Update Thymeleaf Spring integration import from spring5 to spring6 to match Spring Boot 3's dependency on Spring Framework 6.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/service/Mai.why_exists: Compile error: class org.thymeleaf.spring5.SpringTemplateEngine does not exist; Thymeleaf 3.1+ uses spring6 package for Spring 6 compatibility.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/service/dto.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/service/dto.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/Ac.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/Ac.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not present in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/Ac.general_idea: Migrate validation API imports from javax to jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/Ac.why_exists: javax.validation classes are not present in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/Co.general_idea: Migrate validation API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/Co.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/Us.general_idea: Migrate validation import from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/Us.why_exists: Import javax.validation.Valid fails to resolve on Java 21 with Spring Boot 3, which uses the jakarta.* namespace instead of javax.*.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/Us.general_idea: Migrate validation API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/Us.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error (package not found).

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation imports to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.why_exists: javax.annotation.Nonnull and javax.annotation.Nullable classes are removed from the JDK and not present in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.general_idea: Migrate javax.servlet import to jakarta.servlet to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.why_exists: javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest class is removed from the classpath when using Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the annotation on serialVersionUID.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/er.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/vm.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/vm.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/vm.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/web/rest/vm.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x); code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist'.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 annotations to JUnit 5 annotations for test lifecycle management.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations like @Before are not recognized by JUnit 5 Jupiter engine, causing tests to be skipped or fail to execute.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/config/WebC.why_exists: The javax.servlet package was removed from the classpath in Spring Boot 3.x (which requires Jakarta EE 9+), leading to ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/repository/.general_idea: Migrate test annotations from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/repository/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations (@Before, @Test, @RunWith) are not recognized by the JUnit 5 platform used by Spring Boot 3, causing tests to be ignored or fail to execute.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/repository/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/repository/.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Spring Boot 3 (which uses Tomcat 10+); using it causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) with Spring Boot 3 native test support.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.why_exists: SpringRunner is part of spring-test 5.x which is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x (Spring Framework 6.x); the class no longer exists or is not compatible.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 imports to JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) imports.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.*) are not part of the default test runtime in Spring Boot 3.x projects configured for JUnit 5; using them causes compilation errors if dependencies are removed or if the test engine expects JUnit 5 annotations.
The @Before annotation from JUnit 4 is not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine; the test method will not be executed as a setup method, leading to test failures or skipped setup.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 expected exception syntax with JUnit 5 assertThrows.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.why_exists: JUnit 5 @Test does not support the 'expected' attribute; using it results in a compilation error or the exception not being properly validated.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.general_idea: Add import for JUnit 5 assertThrows static method.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Do.why_exists: The assertThrows method is not available without importing it from org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions; this causes a compilation error.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Se.general_idea: Migrate test annotation from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/Se.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like org.junit.Test are no longer supported or detected by the test runner, causing tests to be skipped or compilation errors if dependencies are removed.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 import to JUnit 5 import for the BeforeEach lifecycle annotation.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.why_exists: The class uses @BeforeEach which is a JUnit 5 annotation; importing org.junit.Before (JUnit 4) would cause a compile error if the annotation usage was also updated, or conversely, using the JUnit 4 annotation with JUnit 5 runner would result in the method not being executed as a setup method.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 import to JUnit 5 import for the Test annotation.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.why_exists: The class uses @Test which is a JUnit 5 annotation; importing org.junit.Test (JUnit 4) would cause a compile error if the annotation usage was also updated, or conversely, using the JUnit 4 annotation with JUnit 5 runner would result in the method not being executed as a test.

src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.general_idea: Rename JUnit 4 @Before annotation to JUnit 5 @BeforeEach annotation.
src/test/java/io/jojoaddison/security/jw.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not recognize @Before; using it would result in the setup method not being executed before tests, leading to NullPointerExceptions or test failures due to uninitialized state.
